packs.title: App-Specific Skills
packs.summary: Skills tied closely to specific local app codebases and their live product surfaces.

packs.title: Audience and Fandom Strategy
packs.summary: Personality-led audience analysis, fandom design, and creator-world strategy for public or user-authorized material.

packs.title: Creator and Fandom Stack
packs.summary: A fuller creator-brand workflow covering canon, rituals, identity, merch, messaging, and launch-ready packaging.

packs.title: Daily Briefs and Reference
packs.summary: Skills for daily historical context, market-reading archives, git momentum check-ins, local monitoring, and readable exports.

packs.title: Fandom Skill Pack
packs.summary: Audience strategy skills for canon mining, community rituals, lore pacing, merch concepts, and narrative risk review.

packs.title: Games and Minecraft
packs.summary: Game-console helpers plus Minecraft server operations and skin tooling for play, hosting, and customization workflows.

packs.title: Launch and Distribution
packs.summary: Skills for shaping a project, packaging it well, and getting it ready to publish or ship.

packs.title: macOS Utility Builders
packs.summary: Skills for planning, shaping, or refining focused macOS utilities and menu bar tools.

packs.title: Productivity and Workflow
packs.summary: Skills for workspace setup, document workflows, local utilities, and repo-driven skill management.

packs.title: Utility Builder Stack
packs.summary: A practical bundle for shipping Mac utilities, local monitors, workflow tools, and app-adjacent builders.
